name: color-identity
description: Theme-aware workspace coloring — distinguish VS Code windows with colors that harmonize with your active color theme.

commands.title: ColorIdentity: Refresh Colors for Current Theme

colorIdentity.enabled.description: Automatically apply identity colors when a workspace opens.

enumDescriptions: Basic dark/light theme detection with fixed color presets.
Advanced mode: offers color-shift options that harmonize with your active theme's palette.
colorIdentity.colorMode.description: Color selection mode. 'simple' uses basic theme detection; 'harmonized' generates palette options that integrate with your active theme.

colorIdentity.affectTabBar.description: Colorize the editor tab bar background.

colorIdentity.saturationAdjustment.description: Fine-tune saturation relative to the theme-derived default (-50 to +50).

colorIdentity.lightnessAdjustment.description: Fine-tune lightness relative to the theme-derived default (-30 to +30).

colorIdentity.hueOverride.description: Override the auto-detected hue (0–360). Set to null for automatic hue based on workspace name.

colorIdentity.harmonyOffset.description: In harmonized mode, the angular offset from the theme's base hue. Automatically set when picking a color in harmonized mode. The effective hue is recalculated when the theme changes.
